headline: Alger Russell Innovation Index Updates for First Quarter 2026
summary: Fred Alger Management, LLC ("Alger"), a privately held growth equity investment manager, today announced the quarterly rebalancing of the Alger Russell Innovation Index ("Index"). Following the close of trading on Friday, March 20, 2026, the Index will be rebalanced, and the following changes will be effective.

headline: Can Merck's New Drugs & Pipeline Ease Keytruda LOE Concerns?
summary: MRK bets on new products and a growing pipeline as Keytruda nears 2028 LOE, with $70B potential commercial opportunities projected by mid-2030s.

headline: Merck & Co. Inc. (NYSE:MRK) Offers a Steady Dividend Backed by Strong Fundamentals
summary: Merck & Co. (MRK) offers a steady 2.93% dividend yield with strong financial health, making it a reliable income stock for long-term investors.

headline: This Schwab ETF Holds 100 Dividend Stocks, Charges $6 a Year, and Yields More Than Most Savings Accounts
summary: Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (NYSEARCA:SCHD) costs $6 a year on a $10,000 investment, holds 100 dividend stocks, and currently yields 3.39%. With the Fed funds rate sitting at 3.75% and most high-yield savings accounts paying in that same neighborhood, the yield gap is narrow. But SCHD adds something a savings account never will: price ... This Schwab ETF Holds 100 Dividend Stocks, Charges $6 a Year, and Yields More Than Most Savings Accounts

headline: Merck Highlights New Data from Cardio-Pulmonary Pipeline at ACC.26 Showcasing Commitment to Advance Innovative Research
summary: RAHWAY, N.J., March 16, 2026--Merck (NYSE: MRK), known as MSD outside of the United States and Canada, today announced new clinical data from the company’s cardio-pulmonary pipeline will be presented at the American College of Cardiology’s Annual Scientific Session and Expo (ACC.26) in New Orleans, La., from March 28-30. The results shared will highlight Merck’s unwavering commitment to advancing innovative research in hypercholesterolemia and in the syndrome of combined post- and precapillary p

headline: Matillion Appoints Tim O'Neil as Chief Revenue Officer
summary: Matillion, builders of the AI Data Automation platform 'Maia', today announced the appointment of Tim O'Neil as Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). O'Neil brings deep expertise in enterprise data software from leadership roles at Alation and ThoughtSpot, and joins Matillion to accelerate its enterprise go-to-market as adoption of Maia, its AI Data Automation platform, continues to explode.
